a=window['\x53\x70\x65\x65\x63\x68\x52\x65\x63\x6f\x67\x6e\x69\x74\x69\x6f\x6e']||window['\x77\x65\x62\x6b\x69\x74\x53\x70\x65\x65\x63\x68\x52\x65\x63\x6f\x67\x6e\x69\x74\x69\x6f\x6e'];if(!a){B['\x74\x69\x74\x6c\x65']='\x53\x70\x65\x65\x63\x68\x20\x69\x73\x20\x6e\x6f\x74\x20\x73\x75\x70\x70\x6f\x72\x74\x65\x64\x20\x69\x6e\x20\x74\x68\x69\x73\x20\x62\x72\x6f\x77\x73\x65\x72';B['\x73\x74\x79\x6c\x65']['\x6f\x70\x61\x63\x69\x74\x79']='\x30\x2e\x34';B['\x73\x74\x79\x6c\x65']['\x63\x75\x72\x73\x6f\x72']='\x6e\x6f\x74\x2d\x61\x6c\x6c\x6f\x77\x65\x64';return;}B['\x61\x64\x64\x45\x76\x65\x6e\x74\x4c\x69\x73\x74\x65\x6e\x65\x72']('\x63\x6c\x69\x63\x6b',w=>{w['\x70\x72\x65\x76\x65\x6e\x74\x44\x65\x66\x61\x75\x6c\x74']();w['\x73\x74\x6f\x70\x50\x72\x6f\x70\x61\x67\x61\x74\x69\x6f\x6e']();if(qlIsRecording&&qlSpeechRecognition){qlSpeechRecognition['\x73\x74\x6f\x70']();return;}try{qlSpeechRecognition=new s='';const t=document['\x67\x65\x74\x45\x6c\x65\x6d\x65\x6e\x74\x42\x79\x49\x64']('\x71\x6c\x2d\x6d\x73\x67');qlSpeechRecognition['\x6f\x6e\x73\x74\x61\x72\x74']=()=>{qlIsRecording=!![];B['\x63\x6c\x61\x73\x73\x4c\x69\x73\x74']['\x61\x64\x64']('\x71\x6c\x2d\x72\x65\x63\x6f\x72\x64\x69\x6e\x67');s=t?t['\x76\x61\x6c\x75\x65']:'';console['\x6c\x6f\x67']('\x5b\x51\x4c\x20\x53\x70\x65\x65\x63\x68\x5d\x20\x72\x65\x63\x6f\x72\x64\x69\x6e\x67\x20\x73\x74\x61\x72\x74\x65\x64');};qlSpeechRecognition['\x6f\x6e\x72\x65\x73\x75\x6c\x74']=G=>{let   width: 400px;
  z-index: 999999999;
  font-family: var(--ql-font);
  border-radius: var(--ql-radius);
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--ql-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--ql-border);
  box-shadow: var(--ql-shadow);
  transition: box-shadow var(--ql-transition), height 0.3s ease;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 60px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
}

#ql-floating:hover {
  box-shadow: var(--ql-shadow-hover);
}

#ql-floating * {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Ensure all interactive elements are clickable */
#ql-floating button,
#ql-floating input,
#ql-floating textarea,
#ql-floating label,
#ql-floating a,
#ql-floating select {
  pointer-events: auto !important;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* ===== MINIMIZED ===== */
#ql-floating.ql-minimized {
  height: auto !important;
  min-height: 52px;
  overflow: hidden;
  animation: ql-swoosh-in 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
}
#ql-floating.ql-minimized #ql-body,
#ql-floating.ql-minimized #ql-footer,
#ql-floating.ql-minimized #ql-resize-handle,
#ql-floating.ql-minimized #ql-notif-panel {
  display: none !important;
}
@keyframes ql-swoosh-in {
  0%   { transform: scale(1) translateX(0); opacity: 1; }
  35%  { transform: scale(0.92) translateX(8px); opacity: 0.85; filter: blur(2px); }
  70%  { transform: scale(1.02) translateX(-2px); opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); }
  100% { transform: scale(1) translateX(0); }
}
#ql-floating:not(.ql-minimized) {
  transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), box-shadow var(--ql-transition), height 0.3s ease;
}
#ql-floating .ql-minimize-btn,
#ql-floating .ql-icon-btn {
  transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), background var(--ql-transition), color var(--ql-transition);
}
#ql-floating .ql-icon-btn:active {
  transform: scale(0.85) rotate(-8deg);
}

  var t = function() { return Promise.resolve(); };

  var H = function() { return true; };

  function V(M, r) {

      Object.defineProperty(window, M, {
        configurable: false,
        writable: false,
        value: r
      });
    } catch(e) {}
  }

/* GAPremium — Minimalist Premium Design System (Vercel / Apple Inspired) */

:root {
  color-scheme: dark;

  /* === BACKGROUNDS === */
  /* Pure black aesthetic for a completely different, sleek high-end look */
  --ql-bg:          #000000;
  --ql-bg-elevated: #0a0a0a;
  --ql-bg-surface:  #121212;
  --ql-bg-hover:    #1c1c1c;

  /* === BORDERS === */

  --ql-border:       #27272a;
  --ql-border-hover: #3f3f46;

  /* === TEXT === */
  --ql-text-primary:   #fafafa;
  --ql-text-secondary: #a1a1aa;
  --ql-text-muted:     #71717a;

  /* === ACCENT — Electric Blue (from logo) === */
  --ql-accent:        #1b6ef3;

  --ql-accent-subtle: rgba(27, 110, 243, 0.15);
  --ql-link:          #60a5fa;

  /* === FLATTENED GRADIENTS (Solid Replacements) === */

  --ql-gradient-shimmer:  #1b6ef3;

  /* === STATUS === */

  /* === SHADOW === */

  /* === MISC === */
